MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF EMA BELL's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition settlements.

Order and Consent Jugment are signed.

Declaration Of Evan J. Smith In Support Of Plaintiffs Application For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-21-2024 Continued To Nov-20-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for default judgment against Defendant Anthem Sports LLC.

Dept.505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" only to be used in compliance with California Government Code Section 69957, commencing at 9:22:55 a.m. and concluding at 9:25:30 a.m. (D505).

Evan Smith, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff Ema Bell.
Defendant Anthem Sports LLC not appearing.

Counsel requests the court to vacate the default against defendant Anthem Sports LLC as there is an ongoing settlement between the parties.

The court informs counsel that motions to vacate the default is not done in this department and the motions is to be filed in the papers in a different department.

The court is inclined to take the matter off calendar for allow plaintiff to file the necessary motions/documents with the court.

Plaintiff request for a 90-day continuance and offer proof of the request.

Good cause appearing, the Court grants the request to continue the matter to November 20, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 505. Plaintiff is to provide notice and file with the court the new hearing date.
